option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Bai 4 - URL Param -> ModelMap -> JSP
## So do I/O (Data Flow)
`/bai4/products?category=chay&limit=10`
`category`, `limit` (URL query) -> `ProductController#getProducts(...)` -> `ModelMap` keys: `category`, `limit`, `message` -> View name: `productList` -> JSP file: `/WEB-INF/views/productList.jsp`
## Endpoint
- URL: `/bai4/products?category=chay&limit=10` - Method: `GET` - Controller tra ve ten view: `productList`
## Loi du lieu sai kieu
Neu go `limit=abc` (khong phai so), Spring se khong ep duoc chuoi sang `Integer` va tra ve **400 Bad Request** voi loi bind kieu (`MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException`).

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
